news.t: Pacer ETFs Strengthens Global Equity Exposure with the Launch of the Pacer ActiveAlpha India Quality ETF

holdings.infoBox: INDQ is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eicher Motors stock at 5.19%, Titan Company at 4.85%, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories at 4.73%, Hero MotoCorp at 4.50%, and Indus Towers at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Pacer ActiveAlpha India Quality ETF (INDQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ActiveAlpha India Quality index. The fund is a passively managed ETF, providing a narrow portfolio of publicly traded Indian equities screened for quality, value, growth, size, low volatility, and momentum factors. INDQ was launched on Mar 31, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.

holdings.n: Nippon Life India Asset Management Limited

data.title: Pacer ETFs Strengthens Global Equity Exposure with the Launch of the Pacer ActiveAlpha India Quality ETF
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $INDQ #ETF--Pacer ETFs launches the Pacer ActiveAlpha India Quality ETF, strengthen global ETF offerings with factor-based access to India's equity market.
